summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2 features for Alif Amin Academy. All 31 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified Teacher Dashboard (tabs, availability management, Add Slot modal), Student Dashboard, Browse Teachers, Book Class, and Admin Dashboard. Fixed 2 bugs: route ordering issue for /teachers/dashboard and AvailabilityCreate model requiring redundant teacher_id.

issues: Chart data (User Growth, Revenue Trend, Attendance Rate) uses MOCKED static data - this is expected as noted in requirements

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Route ordering issue - /teachers/dashboard was being matched by /teachers/{teacher_id} because it was defined after the parameterized route. Moved /teachers/dashboard before /teachers/{teacher_id} in server.py
Fixed: AvailabilityCreate model had redundant teacher_id field when the endpoint already has teacher_id in the path parameter. Removed teacher_id from the model.
seed_data_creation: Created teacher session for user_teacher001 (Ustaz Ahmad bin Abdullah) for testing teacher dashboard and availability management
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully tested and working: 1) Teacher Schedule Management - Teachers can view dashboard with tabs (Today's Schedule, Manage Availability, My Info), add availability slots via modal. 2) Student Booking Calendar - Students can browse teachers at /student/teachers, view teacher availability and book classes at /student/book/:teacherId. 3) Join Class button with Google Meet link appears in upcoming classes. Admin Dashboard all tabs functional. Test sessions for admin, student, and teacher roles are available for reuse.

backend_tests: Teacher dashboard with teacher token - PASSED
Admin users endpoint with filtering - PASSED
frontend_tests: Teacher Dashboard loads with tabs - PASSED
Manage Availability tab shows slots - PASSED
Add Slot modal opens with form fields - PASSED
Student Dashboard loads with stat cards - PASSED
Browse Teachers page shows 3 teachers - PASSED
Book Class page shows booking types and time slots - PASSED
Admin Dashboard all 6 tabs accessible - PASSED

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Route ordering: /teachers/dashboard was matched by /teachers/{teacher_id} because parameterized route was defined first
AvailabilityCreate model required teacher_id in body when endpoint already has it in path
